questions.question: Which Indian youngster has been chosen for UN – 2020 cohort of young leaders for the Sustainable Development Goals?
questions.explanation: An 18-year-old Indian youngster Udit Singhal has been named by the United Nations to the 2020 cohort of young leaders for the Sustainable Development Goals. Udit Singhal is the founder of Glass2Sand which is a zero-waste ecosystem that addresses the problem of glass waste in Delhi.

questions.question: At which of the following places, India does not have Strategic Petroleum Reserves currently?
questions.explanation: In India, there are three underground Strategic Petroleum Reserves located in Manglore, Visakhapatnam and Padur(Karnataka). Indian Strategic Petroleum Reserves Limited (ISPRL) is an Indian company that deals with maintaining the country’s strategic petroleum reserves.

questions.question: What is the approximate gap between solar year and lunar year, which results into Adhik Mas in Hindu Calender after certain years?
questions.explanation: There is a gap of 11 days, 1 hour, 31 minutes and 12 seconds(approx 11 days) between solar year and lunar year because the solar year is of 365 days and about 6 hours and the lunar year is of 354 days which results into Adhik Mas in Hindu Calender after 32 months.

questions.question: Project Shield which is a unique initiative aimed at combating crimes against women and children and to create safe and violence-free communities for them in the five districts of which state?
questions.explanation: The Project Shield is launched in five districts of Tamil Nadu; Tiruchi, Pudukottai, Karur, Perambalur and Ariyalur in order to combat crimes against women and children and to create a sage and violence free communities for them in these five districts along in collaboration with the International Justice Mission and stakeholders working for the welfare of women and children in Tiruchi range.

questions.question: On which date, World Rhino Day is celebrated each year?
questions.explanation: World Rhino Day is celebrated every year on September 22 and provides the opportunity for cause-related organizations, NGOs, zoos, and members of the public to celebrate rhinos in their own unique ways and also provides an opportunity to work towards saving the animal, which has been the target of poaching for decades.

questions.question: The term Fully Accessible Routes (FAR), that was recently in news, is related to which of the following?
questions.explanation: ‘Fully Accessible Route’ refers to a new route of Investment by Non-residents in Government Securities of India announced in Budget 2020-21. The government has lifted almost all restrictions related to investment ceilings etc. under this route. The term was recently in news again as America’s investment bank JP Morgan opted not to include India’s government bonds in one of its flagship emerging market indexes after investors cited ongoing problems with capital controls, custody and settlement and other operational snags in India.

questions.question: What is the name of the hackathon launched by Indian Council of Agricultural Research under National Agricultural Higher Education Project (NAHEP) to promote innovation in farm mechanization?
questions.explanation: The Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) under National Agricultural Higher Education Project (NAHEP) launched a hackathon named as ‘KRITAGYA’ in order to promote potential technology solutions for enhancing farm mechanization with special emphasis on women friendly equipments.

questions.question: World Blood Donor’s Day is observed on which date?
questions.explanation: Each year, World Blood Donor Day (WBDD) is observed on 14th June and the theme of World Blood Donor Day 2020 was “Safe Blood Saves Lives” to raise awareness of the need for safe blood and blood products.

questions.question: Recently, the Cabinet Committee for Economic Affairs approved interim extension to Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan. In which year, this scheme was launched?
questions.explanation: The Cabinet Committee for Economic Affairs approved the second phase of the centrally sponsored Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan (RUSA) for a period of three years i.e. 1st April 2017 to 31st March 2020. The scheme was launched in 2013.

questions.question: Recently, The Government of India integrated which portal with the Geographic Information System (GIS) system of six states to provide an update on land availability?
questions.explanation: The Government of India has integrated the Industrial Information System (IIS) portal with the Geographic Information System(GIS) of six states to provide information and updates on land availability and plot level information to investors anywhere in the world on real time bass and help them to make informed decisions. Industrial Information System (IIS) portal is a GIS-enabled database of industrial areas/clusters across the country.
